title: BDRY - November 12, 2024
summary: Capesize Activity Picks Up as Winter Market Takes Hold - The October slump in Capesize spot rates is now behind us, China Stimulus Once Again Disappoints - For the third consecutive time, expectations of substantial fiscal stimulus Our Long-term View - The last few years have been characterized by increased geopolitical uncertainty.
